blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 18 inches of snowfall of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 3,666 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 13°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
